series_metadata.series_description: Information is filed by drawing date compiled by Drawing Department Representative. Lists tumblers, ball sets used, number drawn, and note any problems encountered during studio drawings. Approved by State Auditor and Drawing team reps. Seal log notes the seal installed and removed on equipment, doors, cage, ball containers and ball safe used for that respective drawing.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area for one (I) year, then enter information into system; Unless the information was not entered into the online system, then retain hard copy for six (6) years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain information in the Drawing Information System for five (5) years; then erase., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
